codegen.selectTablesTip: Please select tables to generate code
codegen.getDataSourceConfigFailed: Failed to get data source config
codegen.parentMenuHelp: Assign to a specified menu, e.g. System Management
codegen.moduleNameHelp: Module name, i.e. first level directory, e.g. system, infra, tool
codegen.businessNameHelp: Business name, i.e. second level directory, e.g. user, permission, dict
codegen.classNameHelp: Class name (capitalized), e.g. SysUser, SysMenu, SysDictData
codegen.classCommentHelp: Used as class description, e.g. User
codegen.author: Author
codegen.sortHelp: Set sorting rules for fields in the list. Fields must be queryable to be effective
codegen.isI18nHelp: When enabled, internationalization configuration will be generated in the code
codegen.isImportHelp: When enabled, Excel import functionality will be generated in the code
codegen.popupTypeHelp: Select the display mode for the detail page popup
codegen.i18nModuleTypeHelp: Select the module for i18n messages, used to generate corresponding i18n keys
codegen.treeParentColumnHelp: Parent code field name for tree display, e.g. parent_Id
codegen.treeNameColumnHelp: Name field for tree node display, usually name
codegen.masterTableHelp: Master table (parent table) name, e.g. system_user
codegen.subJoinColumnHelp: Sub table join column, e.g. user_id
codegen.joinRelationHelp: Join relationship between master and sub tables
codegen.basicInfoValidationFailed: Save failed, please check the basic info form validation!!!
codegen.generationInfoValidationFailed: Save failed, please check the generation info form validation!!!
